title: Create: Arms Race Reborn
description: Adds create recipes for guns and ammo in the TACZ mod
body:
Allows you to automate all items from Timeless and Classic Zero (TACZ) (support up to version 1.1.7(still need to add muzzle and scope attachments)) with Create. Adds new materials such as: Steel, Aluminum, and Lead to increase the difficulty of getting weapons. Adds a Research Table which is used to research ammo schematics (Research Time is configurable).

Removing regular TACZ recipes

Set "DefaultPackDebug" in tacz-common.toml to true
Delete all the folders in "config\tacz\custom\tacz_default_gun\tacz\recipes"

Note: Newer versions of tacz has the configs directely in the .minecraft folder in which case it would be under the path of "minecraft\tacz\tacz_default_gun\data\tacz\recipes" the config file was also renamed to "tacz-pre.toml"

*The need for Weapon schematics have been removed by me as I thought it was redundant.~~The items are still in the game cause I'm lazy, some guns don't have recipes yet cause once again, I'm lazy~~ all guns as of 1.1.7 have recipes and the schematics have been properly removed

**all credit goes to the original creator, I just added some new recipes for the new guns

this project has been put on the backburner, i do still intend to update it, but it not going to be soon
